гҖҖгҖҖJoin hosts Michelle Barboza-Ramirez, Kallie Moore, and Blake de Pastino as they take you on a journey through the history of life on Earth. From the dawn of life in the Archaean Eon through the Mesozoic Era вҖ” the so-called вҖңAge of DinosaursвҖқ -- right up to the end of the most recent Ice Age.
introduction: Join hosts Michelle Barboza-Ramirez, Kallie Moore, and Blake de Pastino as they take you on a journey through the history of life on Earth. From the dawn of life in the Archaean Eon through the Mesozoic Era вҖ” the so-called вҖңAge of DinosaursвҖқ -- right up to the end of the most recent Ice Age.
